feed.title: AO3 - Batfamily Members & Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Batfamily Members & Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Dad of the Justice League
entry.summary:
Author: PurpleButterfly19

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,001Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 135

Summary: Several times where Batman acts like a dad towards Justice League members. Hal Jordan takes notice, and soon a whole conspiracy theory is born between League Members. They think Batman is babying them! They simply don’t know he’s just a tired dad who’s prepared for anything.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Chapter 8; Dynasty End
entry.summary:
Author: Corvix_Ailuranthrope_4313

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,838Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 3

Summary: Bruce Wayne is a man, intelligent, dangerous and if the need be ruthless, but still a man, But Batman, Batman is a symbol that cannot die, for Two Hundred years, Batman has protected Gotham, from Villains, Mechas, Meteors and Dark Ages, now in The Year 200 of Batman, a New Batman arises, ready to defend a new Gotham from new threats that we both have and haven't seen.

entry.title: I’ll sing until I remember
entry.summary:
Author: Hyperobsessedfanficwriter

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,313Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 5

Summary: Jason’s been dead for years. Bruce hasn’t been the same since. When he heard the melody he’d sing for him how could he not investigate?!

entry.title: one time, when it all goes wrong
entry.summary:
Author: Zuribat026

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 45,139Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 31

Summary: Beatrice is trying, all things considered. her family feels like it's breaking apart. Clark won't speak to her right now. and things keep happening around her.she needs to help everyone around her, the same way they need to help her.before they can't anymore. i don't own any of the characters and i don't give permission for AI to use my work

entry.title: Power
entry.summary:
Author: ope-uh-oh (shortjacketlongskirt)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 208,001Chapters: 39/?Kudos: 359

Summary: “Oh, you do like to flirt, don’t you?” Lex accused almost playfully, if not for the sharklike emptiness in his eyes. Bruce sat back as the appetizer plates were taken away and replaced with the entrée: filet mignon in a mushroom gravy, served with truffles, asparagus, and black garlic potatoes. He couldn’t help but think Clark would have appreciated this. And he desperately wished he was here with him rather than Vicki. He flashed a playful grin at Lex. “Flirting is what makes the world go round, Lex. What is that quote attributed to Oscar Wilde? ‘Everything in the world is about sex except sex, which is about power’. It applies to everything. Make people think you want them, and you’ve got the whole world in your hands.” After years of living in the closet, trying to ignore the truth, Bruce is finally cornered and is forced to come out in a very public way. This leads to a series of challenges, blending his public and private life in way he can’t escape.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: a blackbird at my door, singin' nevermore
entry.summary:
Author: slightlysmilingface

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,405Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 7

Summary: It starts with Bruce. A child, unformed and scattered. A child that should, in all normal circumstances, be fine. Luck is on his side: he is a boy of privilege, wealth, and one the greatest legacy’s in America’s history. Bruce is what they are before they crack. Before trauma after trauma after trauma beats them down and wears them out and makes them something… Different. Bruce is not an alter, nor a whole person. He is a child. He is the start. *** Or, Bruce Wayne has dissociative identity disorder. Following Bruce from birth through to now.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Little B
entry.summary:
Author: Erilia_31

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,507Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 410

Summary: Bruce Wayne gets turned into his twelve years old self.I don't know what other scenarios/interactions to write for this, so I only have one chapter, but I'll make more if I think of more. Or feel free to comment ideas and I can maybe write it.I've watched Gotham before, but it was a long while ago. I'm rewatching it, but I'm only in the first few episodes, so I might get things wrong. This probably won't be very Canon to anything, but I'll try. Feel free to leave advice.

entry.title: Cursed Child
entry.summary:
Author: J4YYYZ

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,861Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 582

Summary: Bruce gets de-aged into a 16-year old after being hit by an alien weapon from an attempted invasion. The 16 year old who trained under the LOA.The 16 year old who ran away from Alfred.The 16 year old who was manipulated into something else.The 16 year old who was made a weapon.The 16 year old who never had a childhood. Bruce tries to forget the days of when he trained under Ra's, but small habits and reflexes he thought were long gone start to resurface, along with memories being freshly remembered as if it was yesterday. It haunts him slowly, eating him out from the inside before taking action after playing with its food. EDIT: currently being rewritten. Read chapter notes to see what is and what isn’t. Sorry for the confusion, i thought it was clear when it was just the notes.

entry.title: The lost Bat
entry.summary:
Author: Batfam_fanatic

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,771Chapters: 2/4Kudos: 6

Summary: !!! TW: TRAFFICKING!!!Before Damian Al Ghul-Wayne, Bruce had another biological child: Luke Wayne, born from a one night stand during his playboy billionaire era.Little did he know, the woman he had slept with, was a meta, and Luke inherited the gene.He realized that too late, and one day, Luke disappeared.Will Bruce ever see his son again?

entry.title: Not-So-Solitary
entry.summary:
Author: girlbrainiac

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,916Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 289

Summary: After a mis-aimed batarang throw, Batman managed to hold onto the Red Hood in the subsequent explosion. Fearing that he could lose his son again, Bruce keeps Jason locked in the Bat Cave. Jason is exactly where he never wanted to be: stuck in a glass case amidst a colony of Bats he swore he wanted nothing to do with ever again. More annoying than that, though, they refuse to leave him alone or stop talking to him. Sheesh. Now he almost wished they'd sent him to Arkham. ...Almost.

entry.title: Never Have I Ever
entry.summary:
Author: MoonlitMiffy

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,392Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 8

Summary: Cass moves into the Family Wing.Her new life began the moment she stepped into her very own bedroom. She made it four steps in before her new little brother's dragged her out of it.The room can wait, the grand tour of the manor could not (or didn't want to).

entry.title: Coming Home to You
entry.summary:
Author: RandomFan001

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,872Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 254

Summary: Clark had long given up his dream of finding his soulmate. The weird feeling he had when his eyes met Batman’s wasn’t anything but nerves and attraction. Definitely not. But when his instincts start acting up, he starts to suspect it’s something else. Worst of all, so does Batman. Featuring; healthy co-parenting, a healthy amount of pining, and a story about finding love and family

entry.summary:
Author: SunnyxJarrus

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,075Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 431

Summary: Damian wayne was adopted at birth, but then his adoptive parents died and he is sent to live with A foster family which happens to be his biological father :)

entry.title: The Bat’s Tailor
entry.summary:
Author: Batfam_fanatic

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,460Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 7

Summary: Bruce felt like he never had time for love. Between his family, his duty as Batman and keeping up appearances as Bruce Wayne, he didn’t know how to fit it into his schedule.Then he found love in one of the places he despises the most:A gala.When a famous fashion designer by the name of Darius Williams catches his eye, his view on love gets turned upside down.

entry.title: Gotham’s personal devil.
entry.summary:
Author: Agentph03n1x

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,778Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 624

Summary: The day started off like any usual day in the hotel, ghosts huddled around the TV chatting obnoxiously loud, Ester practicing her dark magic, Ben trying to boost his ego and failing in doing so, Nathan trying to work the front desk but scaring off potential customers when his hand goes through keys instead of grabbing them. The same old normal they have become so used to after living in the hotel for so long. However, Abaddon had bigger plans in mind today, yes today on this faithful day, Abaddon was finally going to capture the Moth-man, his arch nemesis since the dawn of time.
